detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 建築設計(九) (Architectural Design(IX))	開課班級 : 建築五	學　　分 : 6.0	授課時數 : 8.0
授課教師 : 黃信穎	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
As a conclusion, the final year project tests students' ability in architecture profession. From initiating, case-studying, programming, developing, and finally presenting, one understands the difficulties and struggles in between every stage of one's own project. Objectively, pupils shall fully explain his/hers project through discourse, case studies, site analysis, mass and design concepts, floor plans, sections, facades and references. Oral presentation, challenge and defence are expected. 


2.教學綱要
Pupils and instructor would exchange opinions and agreements through out the semester. Weekly reports and reviews would be published by the pupils on the Vocus. Final review would take place on the first, second and third of May. Afterwards, exhibition would be organised.
